languages.text: "И что теперь делать? С ножом на Погонщицу идти?"

traits.locale_text: "И что теперь делать? С ножом на Погонщицу идти?"

languages.text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"
languages.original_text: "И что теперь делать? С ножом на Погонщицу идти?"

traits.locale_text: "So what do I do now? Come at the Drover with a knife?"
"So what do I do now? Come at the Drover with a knife?"
"So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"
"So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

languages.text: “那我现在怎么办？抄把刀朝拒生花冲过去？”
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: “那我现在怎么办？抄把刀朝拒生花冲过去？”

languages.text: «¿Y entonces qué hago? ¿Me lanzo a por el Pastor con un cuchillo?».
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Y entonces qué hago? ¿Me lanzo a por el Pastor con un cuchillo?».

languages.text: « Alors, qu'est-ce que je fais ? J'attaque le Chasseur au couteau ? »
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: « Alors, qu'est-ce que je fais ? J'attaque le Chasseur au couteau ? »

languages.text: "Peki şimdi ne yapacağım? Çoban'a bıçakla mı saldıracağım?"
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: "Peki şimdi ne yapacağım? Çoban'a bıçakla mı saldıracağım?"

languages.text: "Und was mache ich jetzt? Soll ich den Treiber mit 'nem Messer angreifen?"
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: "Und was mache ich jetzt? Soll ich den Treiber mit 'nem Messer angreifen?"

languages.text: 「じゃあ俺はどうすりゃいい？ ナイフ一本でドローヴァーに突っ込めってか？」
languages.original_text: "So what do I do now? Charge at the Drover with a knife?"

traits.locale_text: 「じゃあ俺はどうすりゃいい？ ナイフ一本でドローヴァーに突っ込めってか？」
